user.title: Add VIGI or InSight Camera
user.description: Enter the camera's local IP address and credentials.

name.title: Name this camera
name.description: The name pulled from the camera is shown below. You can change it to anything you like — this is how it will appear in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to camera — check the IP address and ensure the camera is reachable.

confirm.title: Confirm entity removal

init.title: Camera feature groups

data.feature_detection_events: Detection events (motion, person, intrusion, and other binary sensors)
data.feature_image_controls: Image controls (brightness, contrast, WDR, flip, and other camera tuning — disabled by default)

data_description.feature_camera_stream:
Detected: {capabilities}

Disable if Frigate or another integration already provides the camera stream.
data_description.feature_detection_events: {note}Disable if Frigate handles detection — this also stops ONVIF event subscriptions.
data_description.feature_image_controls: Adds camera tuning controls to the Configuration section of the device. Entities are disabled by default — enable them individually from the device page. Most users leave this off.

sd_card_missing.title: SD card no longer detected — {camera_name}
sd_card_missing.description:
The SD card was previously present in **{camera_name}** but is no longer detected. SD card sensor entities are still in Home Assistant.

If you have removed the card temporarily, dismiss this — the entities will keep working once the card is reinserted.

If you are no longer using an SD card in this camera, use **Fix** to remove the stale SD card entities.

frigate_camera_gone.title: Frigate camera link lost — {camera_name}
frigate_camera_gone.description:
**{camera_name}** was previously detected alongside a Frigate camera at this IP address, but Frigate no longer has a camera here.

If Frigate was removed or reconfigured, you may want to re-enable **Camera Stream** and **Detection Events** for this camera:
1. Go to **Settings → Devices & Services → VIGI & InSight Cameras**
2. Select **{camera_name} → Configure**
3. Re-enable the relevant feature groups

Dismiss this notice once you have decided how to proceed.
